summary: The CI job failed because the functional test `test_no_truststore_can_install[GitHub]` failed after 3 retries. The test attempts to install a package from GitHub via HTTPS, but the connection to github.com repeatedly returned 502 errors, causing pip to raise an OSError after exhausting retries.
root_cause: Transient network failure: HTTPS requests to github.com returned too many 502 responses. The test `tests/functional/test_truststore.py::test_no_truststore_can_install[GitHub]` tried to install `https://github.com/pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip` but received `HTTPSConnectionPool(host='github.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip (Caused by ResponseError('too many 502 error responses'))` on all 3 attempts (including reruns).

evidence.quote: ERROR: Could not install packages due to an OSError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='github.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip (Caused by ResponseError('too many 502 error responses'))
evidence.reason: This is the actual pip error shown in the test's captured stderr, indicating a transient network failure (502 Bad Gateway) when trying to reach github.com.
The test was retried 3 times (3 RERUN entries), confirming the failure was consistent and not a one-off fluke, but still caused by the same network issue each time.
This is the final test failure summary, showing only 1 test failed out of 1080 passed, confirming the failure is isolated to this network-dependent test.

evidence.quote: 1 failed, 1080 passed, 44 skipped, 21 xfailed, 2 xpassed, 5 warnings, 3 rerun in 451.05s (0:07:31)
evidence.reason: Only 1 test failed in the entire suite, and it was the GitHub-network-dependent test, strongly indicating a transient network issue rather than a code bug.

suggested_fix: Re-run the CI job, as this is a transient network failure (GitHub returning 502 errors). Alternatively, consider marking `test_no_truststore_can_install[GitHub]` with a network-flaky marker or adding retry logic at the test level to tolerate intermittent 502 responses from github.com.

args.pattern: ERROR: Could not install packages due to an OSError: HTTPSConnection
